title: Ariadne Visual Artifact v1
description: Descriptor for a derived visual/output artifact produced by a CAD operation, extraction, patch, diff, or validation — e.g. a rendered PNG, an exported PDF/SVG, a DXF, a staged DWG copy, an IR JSON, or a diff overlay. Referenced from cad_result.v2.artifacts[] and validation_report.v1.artifacts[]. status follows the no-fake-success rule: an artifact that was requested but not produced records status not_implemented/blocked/error with no usable ref, never ok. additionalProperties true for kind-specific metadata.

status.description: Production status. ok = artifact exists at source_ref/refs. error = production failed. blocked = could not produce (precondition/host). not_implemented = the requested artifact kind has no producer. partial = produced but incomplete.

source_ref.description: Path/id of what this artifact derives from (e.g. the DWG or IR it was rendered from). Provenance; for original DWGs this is a READ-ONLY reference.

refs.description: Path(s)/id(s) of the produced artifact file(s). Empty/absent when status != ok.

role.description: Optional role when an artifact has multiple files (e.g. page, layer, before/after).

media_type.description: Primary MIME type (e.g. image/png, application/pdf, image/svg+xml).

route.description: Which router route/lane produced the artifact (e.g. pdf_svg_vector_route, raster_compare_route, geometry_native).
